# Splash Pool & SPA Services, LLC
Premium aquatic solutions based in Maryland, serving residential and commercial clients since 1998.

## Profile Summary
- **Business Name:** Splash Pool & SPA Services, LLC.
- **Location:** P.O. Box 618, Reisterstown, MD. 21136
- **Phone:** +1 410-963-2370
- **Email:** splashpools@live.com
- **Website:** https://splashpoolspa.net
- **Service Area:** Maryland (MD) and surrounding regions.

## Core Services & Solutions
1. **Pool Opening Service:**
   - Full system startup and safety inspection.
   - Note: Does not include repairs; maintenance issues require separate service calls at regular hourly rates.
2. **Pool Closing / Winterization:**
   - Filter drainage and winter cover installation.
   - Requirement: System must be powered, customer must provide cover/submersible pump, and water must be balanced.
3. **Custom Construction:**
   - Architectural pool design and high-end construction using premium materials.
4. **Renovations & Repairs:**
   - Plastering, glass tiling, and coping/decking.
   - Repair services for pumps, filtration systems, and heaters.

## Client Policies
- **Payment Terms:** Pre-payment by February 28th for promotional discounts. 
- **Accepted Payments:** Check, Zelle (splashpools@live.com / 410-963-2370), and Credit Cards (3.0% processing fee).
- **Service Priority:** Scheduling operates on a First-Call, First-Serve basis.
- **Reporting:** Service issues must be reported within 24 hours of completion.

## Disclaimer
- Repair work is separate from opening/closing services. In case of equipment failure at startup, a separate service call must be scheduled at hourly rates.
- Balanced water chemistry is required before closing/winterization to ensure proper system preservation.
